title: ChatContactQueryInput.filter_presence uses wrong enum type
description: ChatContactQueryInput.filter_presence is typed as Option<OwnerPresence> but it is filtering ChatContact objects, which carry ContactPresence. The two enums are structurally identical but semantically distinct — OwnerPresence describes the account owner's self-reported state, ContactPresence describes a remote contact's last-known state. Using OwnerPresence here is a semantic type error. Fix: change filter_presence to Option<ContactPresence> in methods/mod.rs:381 and update any affected call sites and tests.
notes: Epic: jmap-chat-tui-4pp (jmap-chat API idiomaticity: review findings)
